description_long: This is a large, robust machine gun with a long, cylindrical barrel and a prominent integrated bipod for stability during firing. The receiver and body are constructed from dark, matte-finished metal, with a fixed, solid stock at the rear for shoulder support. A curved box magazine is inserted beneath the receiver, and a charging handle is visible on the right side. The barrel is relatively thick and extends well beyond the bipod, ending in a simple muzzle. The iron sights consist of a rear notch and a front post, both fixed to the top of the weapon. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on durability and function.
description: A heavy, dark metal machine gun with a long barrel, integrated bipod, fixed stock, and a curved box magazine. It features simple iron sights and a rugged, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the machine gun, including the fixed stock, curved box magazine, charging handle, and extended barrel with bipod deployed.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular muzzle, symmetrical bipod legs, and the width of the receiver and magazine.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same major features as view 0, with the bipod and magazine clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the stock, the back of the receiver, and the alignment of the iron sights.
attribute_barrel_type: standard cylindrical barrel with no visible fluting or suppressor
attribute_stock_design: fixed solid stock, likely metal or polymer, with a straight ergonomic profile
attribute_iron_sight_configuration: fixed rear notch with fixed front post
